---
title: "Opportunities"
format: html
about:
  template: marquee
  image: images/stbsamp.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/denisroy1
---

### Interested in Joining the lab?

***

### Contact me:
Denis Roy <br>
Natural Resource Sciences <br>
Faculty of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences <br>
McGill University <br>
21111 rue Lakeshore road <br>
Ste Anne-de-Bellevue, Québec, Canada, H9X 3V9 <br>
denis.roy5[at]mcgill.ca <br>

***
